articles.title: Korbous : vers la création d’un port de plaisance et d’un village touristique intégré
articles.brief: La station thermale de Korbous se développe vers une phase de développement touristique basée sur la valorisation de ses ressources naturelles. Un port de plaisance et un village touristique intégré sont en cours de création dans la région.

articles.title: Tripoli : Mohamed Ali Nafti réaffirme le soutien de l’État à la diaspora tunisienne
articles.brief: Mohamed Ali Nafti, le ministre des Affaires étrangères, de la Migration et des Tunisiens à l'étranger, a rencontré un groupe de membres de la communauté tunisienne établie en Libye. Le ministre a réaffirmé le soutien de l'État tunisien à la diaspora tunisienne.

articles.title: Où suivre en direct le match US Monastirienne – Club Africain aujourd’hui ?
articles.brief: The US Monastirienne will face the Club Africain in the 25th round of the Tunisian Ligue 1 on Saturday at 15:00 at the Mustapha Ben Jannet Stadium in Monastir. The match is an important encounter in the title race, with both teams seeking to consolidate their positions in the standings.

articles.title: Alerte STEG : coupure d’électricité de plusieurs heures demain, les détails
articles.brief: La Société Tunisienne de l'Électricité et du Gaz (STEG) a annoncé une coupure programmée de l'électricité pour la journée de dimanche dans plusieurs zones du gouvernorat de Mahdia. L'interruption du courant électrique est prévue pour permettre des travaux de maintenance sur le réseau.

articles.title: Trois enfants retrouvés morts dans un tonneau à Sousse
articles.brief: Trois enfants, âgés de 3 à 7 ans, ont été retrouvés morts à l'intérieur d'un tonneau près de leur domicile à Sousse. Le tonneau était situé dans la région d'Ouled Belkacem, relevant de la délégation de Sidi El Hani.

articles.title: شهداء وجرحى في قصف استهدف مخيم البريج وخان يونس
articles.brief:
قصف استهدف مخيم البريج وخان يونس في [حسنا، يمكنني ذلك فقط إذا كنت قد أدرجت معلومات إضافية حول التاريخ والمنطقة]، مما أدى إلى وقوع شهداء وجرحى.

لا توجد معلومات إضافية متاحة حول هذا القصف.

articles.title: رويترز: أمريكا وافقت على الإفراج عن أصول إيرانية مجمّدة في عدّة بنوك
articles.brief: الولايات المتحدة وافقت على الإفراج عن أصول إيرانية مجمدة في قطر وبنوك أجنبية أخرى. تم الإعلان عن هذا القرار من قبل مصدر إيراني رفيع المستوى في 11 أبريل 2026.

articles.title: الأحد: انقطاع الكهرباء ببعض المناطق بولاية المهدية
articles.brief: انقطاع الكهرباء المتوقع في بعض المناطق بولاية المهدية يوم الأحد 12 أبريل 2026. انقطاع التيار الكهربائي يأتي عن طريق شركة الكهرباء والغاز التونسية.

articles.title: زلزال بقوة 4.5 درجة يهزّ جنوب إيران
articles.brief: زلزال بقوة 4.5 درجة هز جنوب إيران في 11 أبريل 2026. المركز الألماني لأبحاث علوم الأرض أعلن عن الزلزال.

articles.title: سوسة: دعوات لإحداث قسم استعجالي بسيدي الهاني وتعزيز الخدمات الصحيّة
articles.brief: الرئيس الصمايري دعا إلى إحداث قسم استعجالي بسيدي الهاني. كما دعا إلى تعزيز الخدمات الصحية في المنطقة بجهاز إسعاف مجهز.

articles.title: We need a regional agreement for the Strait of Hormuz
articles.brief: The Strait of Hormuz is a critical waterway connecting the Persian Gulf to the Gulf of Oman, with approximately 20% of the world's oil exports passing through it. A regional agreement governing the Strait of Hormuz could help ensure safe and secure navigation for international shipping.

articles.title: Israel in row with South Korean leader over Palestinian abuse concerns
articles.brief: South Korea's president expressed disappointment over Israel's lack of reflection on international criticism regarding Palestinian abuse concerns. The statement was made in response to Israel's handling of the situation.

articles.title: Video: ‘Crucial talks’ says Al Jazeera reporter at US-Iran meeting venue
articles.brief: Talks between Iranian officials and Pakistani mediators have started in Islamabad. The meeting is being facilitated by Pakistani mediators, with no immediate details on the agenda or outcome.

articles.title: NASA hails success of Artemis moon mission but says more work to do
articles.brief: NASA's Artemis II mission successfully sent astronauts around the moon, marking a significant milestone in the space agency's lunar exploration program. The mission's success has been hailed as a "fantastic feat" by NASA scientists, but further work is required to achieve the program's goals.

articles.title: UK to hold off on deal ceding Chagos Islands amid US opposition
articles.brief: The UK has put on hold a deal to return the Chagos Islands to Mauritius due to US opposition. The decision comes as a bill outlining plans for the islands' return has been paused.

articles.title: Mauritanie : accord avec le FMI, cap sur un nouveau programme de 42 mois et des réformes accélérées
articles.brief: Mauritanie a signé un accord avec le Fonds monétaire international (FMI) pour un nouveau programme de 42 mois. Ce programme prévoit des réformes accélérées dans le pays.

articles.title: Open innovation : BMCE Capital adopte le reverse pitch
articles.brief: BMCE Capital has adopted the reverse pitch method, a form of open innovation. This approach allows startups to present their projects to investors, rather than the traditional method where investors pitch to startups.

articles.title: Égypte : Misr Life Insurance – Takaful porte son capital à 7,3 millions USD
articles.brief: Misr Life Insurance – Takaful a augmenté son capital social à 400 millions de livres égyptiennes, équivalent à environ 7,3 millions de dollars américains. L'augmentation a été rendue possible grâce à un apport de 250 millions de livres égyptiennes de la part de ses principaux actionnaires.

articles.title: Rendez-vous : le bulletin d’information trimestriel de la Banque d’Investissement et de Développement de la CEDEAO
articles.brief: The West African Development Bank (BIDC) has published a quarterly newsletter detailing its initiatives on various projects, including energy infrastructure, agricultural transformation, and small business financing. The newsletter outlines the bank's efforts in these areas and its international partnerships.

articles.title: Maroc: une grève de 48h annoncée dans le secteur du gaz butane
articles.brief: Une grève de 48 heures a été annoncée dans le secteur du gaz butane au Maroc. Les détails de la grève ne sont pas disponibles en raison de la restriction d'accès au contenu.

articles.title: Final push for votes as challenger to Hungary's Orbán senses victory
articles.brief: Péter Márki-Zay's opposition movement is leading in the polls ahead of Hungary's election. Tens of thousands of anti-Viktor Orbán supporters gathered in Heroes' Square in Budapest to show support for the opposition movement.

articles.title: Artemis II mission was a triumph - now comes the hard part
articles.brief: The Artemis II mission successfully completed an uncrewed lunar flyby and a crewed test flight around the Moon, marking a significant milestone in NASA's Artemis program. However, the mission's next steps, including landing humans on the Moon, will require overcoming technical challenges and developing the necessary infrastructure.

articles.title: Frontrunner for California governor denies sexual assault allegations
articles.brief: The congressman, a leading Democratic candidate for California governor, has denied allegations of sexual assault. The allegations have led to calls for the congressman to drop out of the gubernatorial race.

articles.title: Melania Trump's speech propels Epstein crisis back to forefront
articles.brief: Melania Trump has given a speech that mentions her friendship with Ghislaine Maxwell, a key figure in the Jeffrey Epstein scandal. The speech has reignited public interest in the Epstein case, which the Trump administration had sought to move past.

articles.title: 'You are my god', Japan's PM tells British rock band Deep Purple
articles.brief: Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi met with British rock band Deep Purple in Tokyo. The Prime Minister expressed admiration for the band, stating "You are my god" to the rockers.

articles.title: Iran War Live Updates: Vance Lands in Pakistan for Peace Talks With Iran
articles.brief: Vice President JD Vance arrived in Pakistan to participate in peace talks with Iran. The talks aim to establish a long-term deal following uncertainty over a potential cease-fire.

articles.title: How Lu Xun, a Famous Chinese Writer, Became a Cute Communist Mascot
articles.brief: The Chinese Communist Party has rebranded Lu Xun, a renowned Chinese writer and Mao-era icon, into a sanitized, cartoon-like character. This reimagining of Lu Xun's image has been criticized for downplaying his original critiques of the establishment.

articles.title: Iran Has Been Consistent in War. Will It Be Consistent in Peace Talks?
articles.brief: Iran has maintained consistent war aims throughout the conflict. The country's stance in peace talks remains uncertain, with its demands yet to be compromised.

articles.title: Iran Tries to Grasp Economic Devastation of War, and Find a Way Past It
articles.brief: Iran is facing significant economic devastation due to US and Israeli bombardment, exacerbating the impact of existing sanctions. The scale of destruction will make sanctions relief crucial for Iran's government as it attempts to negotiate a peace agreement.

articles.title: In New War With Israel, Hezbollah Defies Notion That It Was Crippled
articles.brief: Hezbollah launched a series of intense attacks against Israel, catching many off guard with its military capabilities. The group's performance in the current conflict contradicts previous assessments that it had been weakened.
